headline: As Berkshire Buys Delta Airlines, This Billionaire Just Sold Off AAL and UAL Stocks
summary: Two billionaire investors are making opposite airline bets. While Berkshire is buying Delta, let’s take a closer look at why Appaloosa dumped American and United Airlines stocks.

headline: Is United Airlines Holdings (UAL) One of the Best Airline Stocks to Buy According to Reddit?
summary: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:UAL) is one of the best airline stocks to buy according to Reddit. United Airlines Holdings, Inc. headline: Spirit's collapse, high fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
summary: The unofficial start of the summer travel season on Memorial Day weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.
